documents.title: SMG Essentials Workbook
documents.use: Ten-session student workbook covering goals, companies, stocks, portfolio construction, research, risk, diversification, market analysis, asset allocation, evaluation and reflection.

documents.title: SMG Advisor Guide
documents.use: Teacher setup, platform orientation, implementation guidance and FAQs.

documents.title: The Stock Market Game Teacher's Guide
documents.use: Team formation, roles, research, assessment, rules activities and journal templates.

documents.title: SMG 32-week Curriculum Map
documents.use: Legacy full-year pacing reference still linked by the official teacher-training page; use for sequence ideas, not current rules.

documents.title: Stock Market Game Student Activity Packet
documents.use: Self-guided platform and investing activities suitable for absences, homework and independent support.

documents.title: SMG Rules Handout
documents.use: Printable national portfolio, transaction and participation rules.

documents.title: Summary Table of SMG Rules
documents.use: One-page rule reference for students.

documents.title: Do You Know the Rules? Quiz
documents.use: Rules-readiness check before students can enter a trade.

documents.title: Guide to SMG Portfolio Rankings
documents.use: Explains total-equity and S&P 500 comparison ranking methods.

documents.title: SMG Team Roles
documents.use: Printable director, research, portfolio, data-entry and reporter responsibilities.

documents.title: How to Trade Stocks
documents.use: One-page stock order entry guide.

documents.title: How to Trade Mutual Funds
documents.use: One-page mutual-fund order entry guide.

documents.title: How to Trade Municipal Bonds
documents.use: One-page municipal-bond order entry guide where local SMG rules permit bond trading.

documents.title: How to Trade Corporate and Government Bonds
documents.use: One-page corporate and Treasury bond order entry guide where local SMG rules permit bond trading.

documents.title: Understanding Stock Quotes
documents.use: Printable stock-quote field reference.

documents.title: Jim's Birthday Present
documents.use: Introductory brands, companies and public-company activity.

documents.title: Understanding SMG - Grades 9-12
documents.use: High-school onboarding lesson with team building, journals, roles and assessment prompts.

documents.title: What Is a Company? - Grades 9-12
documents.use: Public/private company and business-structure lesson.

documents.title: What Is a Stock? - Grades 9-12
documents.use: Share ownership, return and shareholder lesson.

documents.title: Identifying Symbols and Interpreting Stock Quotes - Grades 9-12
documents.use: Ticker lookup and quote interpretation lesson.

documents.title: What Is Diversification? - Grades 9-12
documents.use: Diversification lesson and classroom activities.

documents.title: SMG Stock Research Guide and Worksheet
documents.use: Research process, company evidence guide and printable worksheet.

documents.title: What Is Risk? - Grades 9-12
documents.use: Risk concepts, comparison and assessment activities.

documents.title: What Causes Stock Prices to Change? - Grades 9-12
documents.use: Price-change evidence and market-event lesson.

documents.title: Buy, Sell, or Hold? - Grades 9-12
documents.use: Evidence-based portfolio decision lesson.

documents.title: How Successful Was My Investment Strategy? - Grades 9-12
documents.use: Portfolio evaluation, reflection and final assessment.

documents.title: The Study of The Stock Market Game - Summary
documents.use: Two-page official summary of the independent student-outcomes study.

documents.title: The Stock Market Game Study - Brief Report
documents.use: Methodology and findings from the randomized study; retain the 2009 date when citing.

documents.title: The Stock Market Game Study - Full Report
documents.use: Full methodology, instruments, analysis and findings from the randomized study; retain the 2009 date when citing.

documents.use: Current official program and foundation overview.
